candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A summary line above EBIT and outside the selected COGS row 'Cost of materials', but it appears to be a company-level operating depreciation total rather than clearly COGS-specific.
Component of the operating depreciation total, but not labelled as COGS-specific; likely part of the broader 'Depreciations' summary.
Operating amortization component, but not labelled as COGS-specific and likely part of the broader depreciation/amortization summary.
Minor component row under depreciation detail, not clearly tied to COGS and likely part of the broader depreciation total.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Cost of materials'. The statement shows a separate operating D&A block, so D&A does not appear embedded in that selected COGS row. However, no row is specifically identified as COGS/cost-of-sales depreciation or amortization. Using the total 'Depreciations' row for COGS_DA would risk misallocating SG&A-related D&A and double counting across buckets. Conservative output is empty pending manual review.

variables.notes: Manually Changed. Selected XSGA bucket is 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses'. The separate operating D&A lines appear outside that selected row, suggesting D&A may not be embedded there, but no row explicitly states it belongs to SG&A. There is also no separate R&D row selected (XRD is empty), yet no 'amortization in R&D' or SG&A-specific D&A label is visible. To avoid misclassifying a total operating depreciation line as SG&A-only, conservative output is empty pending manual review.
